title: cyathea angelica
intro: Cyathea angelica, also known as the Angel Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat bacterial and fungal infections. The health benefits of Cyathea angelica include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and provide antioxidant properties. Cyathea angelica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in conjunction with other natural remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
